title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies!
